focus: Learn number images 00-19, elements 1-20, and the first two palace rooms.
drill: Walk the first 20 loci forward, then name the element from the locus without looking.

focus: Extend number images to 20-39 and add elements 21-40 in rooms 3 and 4.
drill: Say atomic number, symbol, and name aloud for each new element.

focus: Extend number images to 40-59 and add elements 41-60.
drill: Jump to random loci and recall both the element and the number cue.

focus: Extend number images to 60-79 and add elements 61-80.
drill: Start grouping by family: halogens, noble gases, alkali metals, lanthanides.

focus: Finish number images 80-99 and add elements 81-100.
drill: Run forward and backward recall drills and fix any weak images.

focus: Add elements 101-118 and consolidate the final rooms.
drill: Do full-table walkthroughs and tighten weak loci by exaggerating the action.

focus: Full review day: all 118 elements, all 100 number cues, and a teach-back session.
drill: Teach the palace to someone else or record yourself explaining it from memory.
